name: Ice Cream Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the ice cream slightly, if needed.
2. Place one scoop of softened ice cream between two graham crackers or cookies.
3. Press down gently to ensure all ingredients are well-sealed together.
4. Wrap the sandwich in plastic wrap and place it in the freezer.
5. Allow the sandwiches to firm up completely before serving.
